_comment: Queue of blog topics for the drafting agent. The agent pops the next topic where used=false, generates a draft, and marks it used=true. Add new topics by appending to the end of the array. Order matters — top of the unused list gets drafted first.

_format.title: Working title — the agent may refine the final title to fit 50–60 chars and the target keyword.
_format.targetKeyword: The single long-tail query this post is meant to rank for. Use Google autocomplete or a free tool to validate it.
_format.angle: One sentence describing the unique take. Helps prevent generic posts.
_format.internalLinks: Optional list of other prepfinity.co URLs this post should link to.
_format.used: true once the agent has drafted this topic. Don't manually set true; the script updates it.
